title: glyceria arundinacea subsp. triflora
intro: Glyceria arundinacea subsp. triflora, also known as hard-grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Glyceria arundinacea subsp. triflora include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and lower blood pressure. Glyceria arundinacea subsp. triflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
